title: anacamptis × lloydiana
intro: Anacamptis × lloydiana, also known as the Lloyd's anacamptis or the hybrid green orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species. It is a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between Anacamptis morio and Anacamptis papilionacea. However, there is limited information available about the medicinal properties and health benefits of Anacamptis × lloydiana.
